title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zomato Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Zomato Digital Technologies:
Zomato Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Digital Technologies!
